name: Santhosh Pandi
about: A motivated Full-Stack developer with a solid foundation in TypeScript, Node.js, React.js, Express.js, SQL and MongoDB.
I am quick to learn new technologies and committed to continuous growth.
Eager to contribute to innovative projects and collaborate with dynamic teams.

certifications.name: MasterClass in Full Stack Development
certifications.description: Learn to build modern web applications using the MERN stack. This course covers both front-end and back-end development

certifications.name: Student Leader Internship
certifications.description: An internship program focused on leadership, teamwork, and real-world problem-solving. Designed to empower students with essential professional skills.

certifications.name: Data Strucutures and Algorithms using Java
certifications.description: The Data Structures and Algorithms certification from NPTEL demonstrates proficiency in data structures, algorithms, and their applications in problem-solving.

projects.title: Popup - Header Footer Template
projects.description: A Responsive Header-Footer Template for Website for all compatible devices made by using HTML,CSS

projects.title: Wallet - Currency Converter
projects.description: A React-based web application that allows users to convert currencies from one type to another, using real-time exchange rates. (Frankfurter API)

projects.title: Shopify - ECommerce Website
projects.description: A simple e-commerce responsive website built for both MOBILE and PC, that allows users to browse products, add them to the cart, and place orders. The website is designed with a focus on user experience.

projects.title: Datrix - A Dashboard Template
projects.description: A modern responsive dashboard template includes a sliding navigation bar with different sections. It is designed to be a starting point for building customizable admin dashboards and other web applications.

projects.title: FoodHub - Food Ordering App
projects.description: A full-stack web application built using the MERN stack with JWT-based authentication. The app allows users to sign up, log in, view reviews, order food, view their orders, manage their profile, and log out.

projects.title: AIGen - Color Palette
projects.description: An AI-powered color palette generator built with React + Vite + Tailwind CSS, which uses the OpenRouter API to generate beautiful color schemes based on any scenario or theme you enter.

projects.title: TidyMind - AI-powered mood planner
projects.description: AI-powered mood planner ✍ that turns your emotions into action 🎭 using React, Gemini AI.

projects.title: WhisperWalls - A Social Whispering Platform
projects.description: A creative social platform where users share anonymous “whispers” filtered by mood and category. Implemented features like Category-based filtering, Personalized charts, surprise discovery tool, and user-only whisper walls.

projects.title: TaskTracker - AI-powered Task Extractor
projects.description: Transform meeting transcripts into actionable tasks📒 using AI 🤖. This app leverages Gemini API to extract structured task data and provides a clean UI for managing task history.
